name: Holly Sullivan
role: Head of Worldwide Economic Development at Amazon
bio: A long-time Amazon executive responsible for the company's global economic development and site selection strategy.
_evidence: She led the Amazon HQ2 search team and managed the site selection process and negotiations with local governments.

name: Jeff Wilke
role: CEO of Worldwide Consumer at Amazon
bio: Former CEO of Amazon's Worldwide Consumer division, known for his operational leadership.
_evidence: He was a prominent voice in the early stages of the search, advocating for a data-driven, practical approach to the HQ2 selection.
